title: Haste and Food Charm + CURIOS
description: 3 charms, 3 additions. Never run out of food with this charm! Now with flight affinity!
body:
This mod adds 3 (for now) Charms
which you can keep in your Inventory for them to be active, any slot not just the hotbar!

Made for convenience for easy play! 


1. Feeding Charm
- When your Hunger is lower than full it will apply full hunger and saturation!

RECIPE:

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_3f981ce5-5eef-4867-9dff-650e490fc51b.png)

2. Haste Charm
- When kept in Inventory, it applies Haste effect 2 to the Player.

RECIPE:

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fa38cdd8-9437-45cc-b8f3-c1233ce7664e.png)


Recipes are fairly cheap only gold nuggets and golden carrot/diamond pickaxe!

3.  Air Affinity Charm

*   When kept in Inventory, it removes mining in-flight-penalty from the Player

![Air Affinity Charm](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1470859/description_b4841837-09dd-45b4-8254-caa1e26b3f2f.png)

UPDATE: SEPERATE FILE DOWNLOAD!!! 
- CURIOS SUPPORT
- UPDATED TEXTURES! 
- CHARM ONLY WORKS IN CHARM SLOT! 


***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
